description: Trade type missing 6 fields added via DB migration: entry_bid, entry_spread, config_trailing_pct, config_max_entry, config_trend_min_surges, max_adverse_excursion
resolution_notes: Added all 6 fields to TypeScript Trade interface

description: WsStatus type missing connections and tokens_per_connection fields returned by Python API
resolution_notes: Added connections: number and tokens_per_connection: number[] to WsStatus interface

description: No API endpoints for trends, tracked_tokens, or price_history — DB functions exist but are not exposed

resolution_notes: Available for direct API access and future dashboard use. Low cost to keep.
